SOCIETY AND CULTURE
too prominent on League objets d 'art, however; bringing into the open the commercial element that nas always lurked beneath art'$ surtace The   Capellan   Confederation and the Draconis Combine sprang from cultures long known tor their egant art forms but the Confederation has historically suftered from government manipulation of its most talented artists t0 endorse pro-Liao least pro Contederation stance_ This insistence on cor- rect thinking nas ruined many promising talents buried several who might have stood out in flood similar material: Nonetheless, sorting through the chaff can bring rewards to the fortunate. Despite the   government's neavy hand some Capellan artists manage produce alternative work_ at their own expense and often at Great risk: Such works are huge demand outside the Confederation: Nohkabu theater; one of the Draconis Combine finest art forms_ unfortunately deemed the private possession of that realm. On rare occasions gifted troupe allowed perform for outsiders; permission t0 do 50 considered among the highest compliments_ official holovids of these perform- ances have been released, though bootleg copies exist. Only slightly more obtainable are pottery; painting and other arts ad crafts. The province of the nobility ad the warrior class such art rarely travels outside the Combine_ Art objects become the personab treasures of the family. shared only with close friends_ Both nalves of the Federated Commonwealth are nistori: cally known for their endowment and appreciation of the arts the wealthier Lyran half more for the former; the FedSuns more for the latter: The Lyran Alliance still the only Successor State wnich artists can hope t0 make decent living without find- wealthy benefactor relying state subsidies The Alliance has become tamous iorIts itinerant  musicians and dramatists_ who travel and pertorm in the ancient tradition of Terran troubadours _ In the FedSuns_ Avalon City boasts some of the Inner Sphere largest centers for artistic expression Both states are known for their art connoisseurs, enjoying not only the work of native artists but tnose of other realms as well: Despite the region'$ general penury: some of the finest work currently   being produced is   coming Irom the Periphery: The Outworlds Alliance known for its homerade cratts_ while the Taurian Concordat and the Magistracy Canopus are earning rep utations for powerful. cutting edge works several disciplines
them achieve some peace seemingly chaotic universe _ This ability to simultaneously adopt principles from various religions may be tne first important step toward true religious tolerance
SPIRITUALITY AMONG THE STARS Humanity has adopted ana adapted countless religions and sects. The following are the dominant religions, with the greatest numbers of followers
Christianity Christianity has survived in many forms_ The schism 0f 2772 gave rise to a ffshoot of Roman Catholic orthodoxy; the New Avalon Catholic Church; which House Davion supports as wav promote patriotism in Federated Suns space. The Combine less enthusiastic about Christianity but permits it as long as remains small and quiet. Latter Day Saints_ Evangelists Scientologists, Jehovah' Witnesses, Lutnerans and Baptists are just iew of the popular Christian sects that have survived the centuries Many believe that Jesus Christ was the son of the one true God_ though other sects see Jesus as simply holy man whose ideals and philosophies were divinely inspired_
Judaism Despite the vast changes in human society over the mil Iennia_ Judaism has remained remarkably Ioyal to its acient foundations different movements which Reform; Conservative and Liberal Judaism are the most common: vary more custom and practices than in any alterations t0 the divine teachings of the Torah; Judaism exists in every Inner Sphere nation_ though underground the Draconis Combine.
Islam Muslim iS one who submits himself to Allah_ surren dering himself unconditionally to the divine will . This demanding concept has been misused by politica and religious leaders throughout the centuries t0 inspire fanaticism, and it i5 still used that way some areas the Innei Sphere. Fortunately; most modern sects temper their interpretations of Islam $ core belief. Islamic sects range wider than any other religion between fanatical and liberal wings_ and the faith periodically suffers from internal clasnes Tne Azami sect. which voluntarily includ ea many principles espoused by House Kurita the only vari: ant of Islam to find acceptance the Draconis Combine_
RELIGION Humans have always been  spiritual creatures_ When the colony ships ranged out from Terra in search of new worlds on which t0 settle; they sougnt guidance and support from their reli- gious beliefs as wel as the freedom t0 worship as they saw fit: Ine tumultuous   thirty-first century.  many people teel more than evem the need for spiritual Buidance and support: Four major interstellar wars and several smaller-scale "isolated actions have taken their toll on religious belief, though not to the extent many had   predicted While some people have become disenchanted with religion, more have turned precepts Of one Or several religions and philosophies to nelp
Hinduism collection beliefs and practices more than single defined religion, Hinduism nas survived and tlourished over the millennia because something  for everyone appeal. Ancient Hinduism ranges from village goddess cults to the doc: trines classical Hindu philosophers; the religion also includes more moder gurus, many of whom established cults that have lasted for centuries beyond them: Hinduism along Mith most other Asian religions, is flourishing the Draconis Combine; well as smaller enclaves throughout the Inner Sphere.
